texto: He couldn't imagine using the word 'rewarding' about a work of art - for instance that such and such a book has given me so much, taught me so much, etc etc. - but thought solely that it enlightened him, made him see, cynically and withough false expectations, so that he felt he was alive.
explicacao: Citação de Dag Solstad sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “He couldn't imagine using the word 'rewarding' about a work of art - for instance that such and s…” articula trabalho, art, literature em registro de trabalho, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e literature.
